title: Live PostgreSQL Validation Execution
decision_rationale: A disposable local PostgreSQL container was created only for GL-206B, no host port was published, synthetic/demo data only was used, and the existing GL-205 live validation command ran in true live mode with explicit environment gates. The run passed after two narrow validation-script fixes: using the existing PostgreSQL connection wrapper for migrations and aligning the synthetic audit approved value with the integer schema. The result is ephemeral-only and is not production PostgreSQL readiness.

ephemeral_postgres_safety_assessment.source: Disposable local Docker PostgreSQL container created only for GL-206B

live_validation_result.cleanup_caveat: PostgreSQL audit immutability prevented deleting the synthetic audit event; disposable container destruction completed cleanup.

backup_restore_governance_alignment.postgres_live_backup_restore_deferred_re: Existing script documents an ephemeral-only manual checklist; no automated PostgreSQL restore drill was in scope.

controlled_preview_impact.posture: Developer Preview / Controlled Preview with strict boundaries

remaining_blockers: Production PostgreSQL readiness is not established
Automated PostgreSQL backup/restore drill remains deferred
Production backup retention, encryption, offsite storage, and DR runbooks remain incomplete
Production observability, alerting, tracing, and incident operations remain incomplete
Production IAM, OAuth/JWT/SSO, workspace enforcement, and production tenant administration remain incomplete
Public website publish and public snapshot update remain no-go unless a later gate explicitly approves them

risk_register.risk: Ephemeral success is overclaimed as production PostgreSQL readiness
risk_register.mitigation: Document no-go production impact and enforce wording in tests

risk_register.risk: Raw DSN or credential leaks into artifacts
risk_register.mitigation: Use placeholder command class and scan docs/JSON

risk_register.risk: Audit cleanup warning is misread as validation failure
risk_register.mitigation: Document immutable audit row behavior and container destruction cleanup

risk_register.risk: Backup/restore is assumed complete after live migration validation
risk_register.mitigation: Keep PostgreSQL backup/restore live drill explicitly deferred

risk_register.risk: Validation-script fixes broaden into product behavior changes
risk_register.mitigation: Keep changes confined to validation script; no backend/src or API behavior changes

findings: Live PostgreSQL validation can execute safely against a disposable local PostgreSQL container when GL-205 gates are set.
The existing migration runner is PostgreSQL-compatible when invoked through the repo connection wrapper.
The covered tenant/workspace and audit hash-chain baseline passed on ephemeral PostgreSQL.
PostgreSQL audit immutability blocked synthetic audit deletion; container destruction completed cleanup.
recommended_next_issues: Production PostgreSQL backup/restore automation and DR drill issue
GL-212 Public Snapshot / External Review Gate only if explicitly approved later
